payload.name: python_security_scanner
payload.description: Analyze all local python files for security vulnerabilities

payload.name: recursive_scout
payload.description: A meta-agent that scans the species registry and enqueues missing utility tools (e.g., regex_helper, datetime_parser) whenever the backlog is empty.
